subject: AXP 4U 0142+61: Fermi GBM detection
body:
P. N. Bhat (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 333654039 at 17:40:37.14 UT
on 29 July 2011, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is due to a short burst from AXP 4U 0142+61
